title: MISTING CENTERS - 211info
text: FIRST CHRISTIAN CHURCH MISTING CENTERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Misting stations provide sprayed water in an outdoor space to help cool down in hot temperatures. A shade tent is also available. 1166 Oak Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 11am-2pm (541) 344-1425 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 344-1425 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Extreme Heat Swimming Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FIRST CHRISTIAN CHURCH
